top_findings.summary: The skill's metadata includes "scope: [root]", indicating it requests root-level system access. For a skill focused solely on creating UI/UX designs and implementing frontend code (HTML/CSS/JS frameworks), root permissions are excessive and unnecessary. Frontend development tasks such as editing project files, checking git history, or running local servers do not require elevated system privileges. This overreach poses a security risk if the skill gains unnecessary access to sensitive system areas unrelated to its design/coding purpose.
